title: Sambalpur Heat Wave
lead: Sambalpur is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.06. This anomaly is severely impacting the city.
body:
The current weather conditions in Sambalpur are extreme, with a Score of 10.0/10 indicating a critical level of heat. 
 The heat wave is characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.2 GG, and relatively low wind speed of 4.5 km/h. 
 The humidity level is at 68%, which is adding to the discomfort and increasing the risk of heat-related illnesses.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
